research_interests: Aicha's research expertise and main interests focus on descriptive and theoretical syntax (LFG; Minimalism; Construction Grammar; Functionalist syntax); lexical and cognitive semantics; syntax; semantics interface; linguistic typology; morphology; sociolinguistics; African linguistics; Berber languages esp. Taqbaylit (Afro-Asiatic); Australian languages; South American languages; motion and deixis; agreement; pronouns and clitics; lexical aspect and verbal semantics; TAM; information structure.
